m627.title: Add Glossary
m627.body:
## Goal

We're going to add a glossary section to the website. It's going to store everything in Astros content in a collection called glossary. And the front matters should include the actual term that will be displayed as `label`. We need a route that is the glossary overall, and then a route per term.

## Acceptance Criteria

- A new route /glossary
- A new route /glossary/[TERM]

## Context

This is an Astro 5.x project using content collections with the new `astro:content` API.

**Relevant files and patterns:**
- `src/content.config.ts` - Defines content collections (posts, projects, decks)
- `src/pages/projects/index.astro` - Example list page for a collection
- `src/pages/projects/[project].astro` - Example dynamic route for individual items
- `src/layouts/Layout.astro` - Main layout component with SEO support
- `src/components/Term.astro` - Existing component for displaying term definitions

**Collection structure:**
- Collections are defined in `content.config.ts` using `defineCollection()` with Zod schemas
- Content files live in `src/content/[collection-name]/`
- Uses `glob()` loader to match file patterns
- Dynamic routes use `getStaticPaths()` to generate pages at build time

**Similar implementations:**
- Projects collection uses `src/content/projects/*.mdx` files
- Each project has frontmatter with title, abstract, systems, technologies, tease
- Routes: `/projects` (list) and `/projects/[project]` (detail)

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Create `src/content/glossary/` directory for glossary entries
- [ ] Add glossary collection to `src/content.config.ts` with schema including `label` field
- [ ] Create `src/pages/glossary/index.astro` - list all glossary terms
- [ ] Create `src/pages/glossary/[term].astro` - display individual term details
- [ ] Create a sample glossary entry file (e.g., `src/content/glossary/sample.md`)
- [ ] Test both routes work correctly

## Questions

✅ **Resolved:**
- File format: `.md` files
- Fields: just `label` for now
- Styling: plain layout, user will refine later

## Log

- 2026-02-24: Change created
- 2026-02-24: Planning completed - acceptance criteria and implementation checklist defined based on codebase analysis
- 2026-02-24: Questions answered - using .md format, label field only, plain styling

## Changelog Type

To be determined during implementation (feature/fix/change/deprecated/removed/security/internal)
